description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI (ML stack) that triggers on push to the default branch, deploy-* branches, and tags matching v*.*.*. Run a series of steps on an ubuntu-latest environment named robotoff-ml to deploy and verify a Docker-based ML stack. These steps involve SSHing into a remote host to clone the repository, set environment variables, start services with Docker Compose, verify that services are up, and clean up obsolete Docker objects.
